metadata.title: County Property Tax Rates and Veteran Exemptions — TX
metadata.description: County-level property tax rates, veteran exemption implementation details, and application information for high-veteran-population counties.

notes.tax_rate_format: Rate per $100 of assessed value unless otherwise noted.
notes.scope: Initial release covers counties with major military installations from states in state-benefits.json.
notes.update_cycle: Tax rates typically set annually by county boards.

military_installations: JBSA (Fort Sam Houston, Lackland AFB, Randolph AFB)

property_tax._note: No state property tax. Total varies by taxing jurisdiction overlap.

disabled_veteran_100_pct.eligibility: 100% service-connected or IU per TX Tax Code §11.131

disabled_veteran_partial.applies_to: Any one property (not limited to homestead)

application.address: 411 N Frio St, San Antonio, TX 78207
application.deadline: April 30 (late filing up to 5 years for veteran exemptions)
